intro: I build digital products that connect business goals, user needs, and engineering quality. Over the last 20+ years, I have grown from producer and web developer into a full-stack and frontend architecture leader focused on shipping thoughtful, high-impact software.

featured.role: Staff Software Engineer, Full Stack E-commerce
featured.summary: I lead full-stack e-commerce work focused on customer experience, performance, and measurable business outcomes.
highlights: Partner across product, design, and engineering to ship customer-facing improvements end to end.
Balance speed and quality while keeping the storefront stable, reliable, and conversion-focused.
Own technical decisions from architecture through implementation and release.

featured.role: Frontend Leadership Across Consulting and Enterprise Delivery
featured.summary: I led frontend architecture, client strategy, and team delivery across major consulting engagements in data-heavy and enterprise environments.
highlights: Advised clients on frontend strategy, framework selection, and architecture decisions.
Led frontend teams through complex engagements from planning through delivery.
Built and scaled reusable frontend tooling, standards, and implementation patterns.
Built production applications and interactive prototypes for testing and stakeholder alignment.
Supported major institutions including Bank of America, Goldman Sachs, Credit Suisse, and Barclays.

achievements.summary: I designed and developed the presentation layer for MLBAM web properties, focusing on high-traffic reliability and polished user experience.
highlights: Built advanced JavaScript, HTML, and CSS interfaces for MLB and associated properties.
Implemented UI features that supported large-scale content and traffic demands.
Delivered front-end integrations across XML/JSON and JSP/JSTL-driven systems.

achievements.summary: I managed technical production projects from concept to implementation across MLBAM network features and functionality.
highlights: Collaborated with design, technical, editorial, and marketing teams on cross-functional launches.
Balanced multiple concurrent initiatives while delivering under strict deadlines.
Improved production execution through tighter planning and implementation oversight.

achievements.summary: I partnered with MLB clubs and internal teams to optimize official team sites and improve digital marketing performance.
highlights: Supported club-focused web strategy and performance improvements.
Worked directly with teams including the Chicago White Sox and Kansas City Royals.
Aligned marketing and technical execution to strengthen site outcomes.

timeline.summary: Built client-side and server-side apps with Node.js and JavaScript while supporting mobile app efforts.
Led e-commerce process and frontend workflow improvements across design and engineering teams.
Owned development across international and domestic web properties and CMS-integrated experiences.
Delivered corporate web solutions with designers and project managers across client engagements.
